name: Calculators
description: Financial, health, math, date and everyday calculators that run entirely in the browser.

tools.name: BMI Calculator
tools.description: Calculate Body Mass Index from height and weight in metric or imperial units.

tools.name: Percentage Calculator
tools.description: Find percentages, percentage change, and what percent one number is of another.

tools.name: Age Calculator
tools.description: Compute exact age in years, months, weeks, and days from a date of birth.

tools.name: Loan Calculator
tools.description: Estimate monthly payments, total interest, and payoff for any loan.

tools.name: Mortgage Calculator
tools.description: Calculate home loan payments including principal, interest, taxes, and insurance.

tools.name: Compound Interest Calculator
tools.description: Project investment growth with compounding over time and contributions.

tools.name: Tip Calculator
tools.description: Calculate tip amount and split the total bill among multiple people.

tools.name: Discount Calculator
tools.description: Find sale price and amount saved from an original price and discount percent.

tools.name: Sales Tax Calculator
tools.description: Add sales tax to a price or extract tax from a gross amount.

tools.name: Calorie Calculator
tools.description: Estimate daily calorie needs for maintenance, loss, or gain.

tools.name: BMR Calculator
tools.description: Calculate Basal Metabolic Rate to estimate resting calorie burn.

tools.name: TDEE Calculator
tools.description: Compute Total Daily Energy Expenditure from BMR and activity level.

tools.name: Body Fat Calculator
tools.description: Estimate body fat percentage using the US Navy method measurements.

tools.name: Ideal Weight Calculator
tools.description: Suggest a healthy weight range based on height, age, and gender.

tools.name: Due Date Calculator
tools.description: Estimate a pregnancy due date from the last menstrual period.

tools.name: Ovulation Calculator
tools.description: Predict fertile windows and ovulation days from cycle data.

tools.name: Pregnancy Calculator
tools.description: Track pregnancy progress, week count, and key milestones.

tools.name: GPA Calculator
tools.description: Compute grade point average from course grades and credit hours.

tools.name: Grade Calculator
tools.description: Calculate final or weighted grades and the score needed to pass.

tools.name: Fraction Calculator
tools.description: Add, subtract, multiply, and simplify fractions.

tools.name: Scientific Calculator
tools.description: Full-function calculator with trig, logs, exponents, and constants.

tools.name: Date Calculator
tools.description: Add or subtract days from a date and find the span between two dates.

tools.name: Hours Calculator
tools.description: Calculate total hours and minutes between two times for timesheets.

tools.name: Time Duration Calculator
tools.description: Measure elapsed time between two date-times in multiple units.

tools.name: Countdown Calculator
tools.description: Count down the days, hours, and minutes until any target date.

tools.name: Paycheck Calculator
tools.description: Estimate take-home pay after taxes and common deductions.

tools.name: Salary Calculator
tools.description: Convert pay between hourly, weekly, monthly, and annual rates.

tools.name: Sleep Calculator
tools.description: Suggest bedtimes or wake times based on 90-minute sleep cycles.

tools.name: Random Number Generator
tools.description: Generate random numbers within a custom range with options.

tools.name: Standard Deviation Calculator
tools.description: Compute mean, variance, and standard deviation for a data set.

tools.name: Zakat Calculator
tools.description: Calculate Zakat on gold, silver and wealth in your browser.

tools.name: Afghan Date Converter
tools.description: Convert Shamsi (Solar Hijri) dates to Gregorian and back.

tools.name: Tasbih Counter
tools.description: Digital Tasbih counter for dhikr and Islamic remembrance.

tools.name: Salary Tax Calculator
tools.description: Estimate income tax and net salary from gross pay.

tools.name: EMI Calculator
tools.description: Calculate monthly EMI, total interest, and payment for home, car, or personal loans.

tools.name: VAT / GST Calculator
tools.description: Add or extract VAT and GST from any amount with a custom tax rate.
